seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: Use Markdown format, including one level-1 header titled "Resignation Letter."
new_constraint: The response must include at least two level-1 headers.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. Use Markdown format, including one level-1 header titled "Resignation Letter." The response must include at least two level-1 headers.
response:
# Resignation Letter

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day - typically two weeks from the date of the email].

This was not an easy decision, and I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to work at [Company Name] over the past [Number] years/months. I have genuinely valued my time here and appreciate the experiences and professional development I have gained while working with you and the team.

## Transition Plan and Support

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining two weeks. I am happy to assist in training my replacement and documenting my current projects and responsibilities to minimize disruption to the team's workflow. Please let me know how I can best support this handover process.

Thank you again for the opportunity. I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for continued success in the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Personal Email Address]<turn|>
